note: Propagation in GCRF frame with IERS 2010 conventions. Gravity body frame = GCRF (matches Rust ZonalHarmonics using raw z-axis). Drag uses ITRF internally via full IAU 2006 CIO chain + EOP.

scenarios.name: gcrf_j2_thirdbody_iss_10orbits
scenarios.description: ISS orbit, J2 + Sun + Moon, 10 orbits, GCRF frame

scenarios.name: gcrf_j2_msise_thirdbody_iss_10orbits
scenarios.description: ISS orbit, J2 + NRLMSISE-00 + Sun + Moon, 10 orbits, GCRF frame
